system.description:
Discipline: Dianxue
Skill: Medicine TN 8
Type: Normal
Qi: 1

You touch a series of crucial accupoints, channeling small amounts of Qi in order to increase the flow of energy in key meridians and lower it in others, with the aim of altering the balance of a person’s inherent abilities. For this to be performed you must have a target who is either willing or immobilized. Make a Medicine Skill roll TN 8. On a Success you may change the target’s Discipline Ranks by one increment per Rank of Dianxue (for each increment you can raise 1 Discipline and lower another). On a Total Success you change it by two increments per Rank of Dianxue. The effect lasts for one hour. The character’s Imbalance rating changes accordingly for the duration of the Technique. This Technique takes ten minutes to perform. Cathartic: As above except the changes are permanent.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.requirementNotes: You must have a target who is either willing or immobilized.
system.catharticEffect: As above except the changes are permanent.
